MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Equity Growth Asset Mamnagement is present. Represented by Thomas Carpio.
Attorney Brenda Cruz Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Elizabeth Hernandez and Ana Maria Hernandez are present.
Attorney Melvin Ceasar Belli representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of FEB-11-2013 is vacated.
